General.Name: Tivic Health Systems Inc
General.Description: Tivic Health Systems, Inc. operates as a late-stage immunotherapeutics company. Its lead drug candidate is Entolimod, a TLR5 agonist that is in late-stage development to treat acute radiation syndrome. The company's pipeline also comprises Entolimod to treat Neutropenia and lymphocyte exhaustion; and Entolasta, an immunologically optimized variant of Entolimod for chronic applications. In addition, it offers CDMO services. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in San Antonio, Texas.
General.Address: 47685 Lakeview Blvd., Fremont, CA, United States, 94538
